title: Another night that proves that Russia does not deserve any relaxation...
title_en: Another night that proves that Russia does not deserve any relaxation...
title_uk: Ще одна ніч, яка доводить, що Росія не заслуговує на розслаблення...
description: Another night that proves that Russia does not deserve any relaxation of global policies and the lifting of sanctions. Russia is betting on war, and this is exactly what the answer should be - life must be protected with all forces and pressure for peace must also be exerted with all forces. I am grateful to those in the world who work with us in this way and who help Ukraine on time, fully and feeling that every show of support is really...
description_en: Another night that proves that Russia does not deserve any relaxation of global policies and the lifting of sanctions. Russia is betting on war, and this is exactly what the answer should be - life must be protected with all forces and pressure for peace must also be exerted with all forces. I am grateful to those in the world who work with us in this way and who help Ukraine on time, fully and feeling that every show of support is really...
description_uk: Ще одна ніч, яка доводить, що Росія не заслуговує на будь-яке пом’якшення глобальної політики та зняття санкцій. Росія робить ставку на війну, і саме такою має бути відповідь – потрібно захищати життя всіма силами й потрібно тиснути заради миру теж усіма силами. Я вдячний тим у світі, хто працює з нами так і хто допомагає Україні вчасно, повноцінно та відчуваючи, що кожен прояв підтримки справді...

title: The meeting of the 6th interdepartmental working group on the...
title_en: The meeting of the 6th interdepartmental working group on the...
title_uk: Засідання 6 міжвідомчої робочої групи з...
description: The meeting of the 6th interdepartmental working group on the coordination of the development of unmanned ground systems (complexes) was held. The main goal of the event was to develop an effective model for studying, generalizing and implementing the experience of using ground robotic systems in units, training centers and military management bodies of the Armed Forces of Ukraine. Representatives of various...
description_en: The meeting of the 6th interdepartmental working group on the coordination of the development of unmanned ground systems (complexes) was held. The main goal of the event was to develop an effective model for studying, generalizing and implementing the experience of using ground robotic systems in units, training centers and military management bodies of the Armed Forces of Ukraine. Representatives of various...
description_uk: Відбулося засідання 6-ї міжвідомчої робочої групи з координації розвитку безпілотних наземних систем (комплексів). Основною метою заходу стало напрацювання дієвої моделі вивчення, узагальнення та впровадження досвіду застосування наземних роботизованих комплексів у підрозділах, навчальних центрах та органах військового управління Збройних Сил України. До роботи долучилися представники різних...

title: Dnipro: 13 killed, 86 injured
title_en: Dnipro: 13 killed, 86 injured
title_uk: Дніпро: 13 загиблих, 86 поранених
description: Update: Russia slams Ukrainian cities in mass missile attack overnight — at least 13 dead, 86 injured. Russian missiles destroyed homes, burned buildings, and killed civilians in Ukraine's major cities in a mass overnight strike on April 16, with residential neighborhoods in Kyiv, Dnipro, and Odesa bearing the brunt of the attack. In Odesa, seven people were killed and 11 others injured. In...
description_en: Update: Russia slams Ukrainian cities in mass missile attack overnight — at least 13 dead, 86 injured. In Odesa, seven people were killed and 11 others injured. In...

In Odesa, seven people were killed and 11 others injured. In...

title: Dnipro: 7 killed, 72 injured
title_en: Dnipro: 7 killed, 72 injured
title_uk: Дніпро: 7 загиблих, 72 поранених
description: Update: Russian missiles slam Kyiv, Dnipro overnight — at least 7 dead, 72 injured. At least five people, including a child, were killed in the attacks against Kyiv, while 45 others were injured. Twenty-six of the injured victims have been hospitalized. In Dnipro, two people were killed and 27 others injured. Photos: Ukraine's State Emergency Service / Telegram
description_en: Update: Russian missiles slam Kyiv, Dnipro overnight — at least 7 dead, 72 injured. At least five people, including a child, were killed in the attacks against Kyiv, while 45 others were injured. Twenty-six of the injured victims have been hospitalized. In Dnipro, two people were killed and 27 others injured. Photos: Ukraine's State Emergency Service / Telegram
description_uk: Update: Russian missiles slam Kyiv, Dnipro overnight — at least 7 dead, 72 injured. At least five people, including a child, were killed in the attacks against Kyiv, while 45 others were injured. Twenty-six of the injured victims have been hospitalized. In Dnipro, two people were killed and 27 others injured. Photos: Ukraine's State Emergency Service / Telegram

title: During the morning alarm in the Podolsk district, a Russian drone...
title_en: During the morning alarm in the Podolsk district, a Russian drone...
title_uk: Під час ранкової тривоги в Подільському районі російський безпілотник...
description: During the morning alarm in the Podolsk district, a Russian drone literally flew into an 18-story building. According to the mayor of the capital Vitaliy Klitschko, the drone was flying very low. Emergency services are dispatched to the scene.
description_en: During the morning alarm in the Podolsk district, a Russian drone literally flew into an 18-story building. According to the mayor of the capital Vitaliy Klitschko, the drone was flying very low. Emergency services are dispatched to the scene.
description_uk: Во время утренней тревоги в Подольском районе руснявый дрон буквально влетел в 18-тиэтажку. По данным столичного мэра Виталия Кличко, дрон летел очень низко. Экстренные службы направляются на место.

title: Casualties reported
title_en: Casualties reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про постраждалих
description: An air alert has been declared in Kyiv and a number of regions due to an anti-aircraft threat. Meanwhile, the capital's mayor spoke about the consequences of the night strike. According to him, a woman and a child were killed, and a group of medics who went to rescue people were injured.
description_en: An air alert has been declared in Kyiv and a number of regions due to an anti-aircraft threat. Meanwhile, the capital's mayor spoke about the consequences of the night strike. According to him, a woman and a child were killed, and a group of medics who went to rescue people were injured.
description_uk: В Киеве и ряде областей объявлена воздушная тревога из-за угрозы БпЛА Тем временем мэр столицы рассказал о последствиях ночного удара. По его данным, погибла женщина и ребенок, ранения получила группа медиков, ехавшая спасать людей.

title: Kyiv: Ukraine hits major Russian oil refinery in Krasnodar Krai, media,...
title_en: Kyiv: Ukraine hits major Russian oil refinery in Krasnodar Krai, media,...
title_uk: Київ: Україна завдала удару по великому російському нафтопереробному заводу в Краснодарському краї, ЗМІ,...
description: Ukraine hits major Russian oil refinery in Krasnodar Krai, media, officials report. The Tuapse Oil Refinery, a Rosneft facility, is one of the 10 largest refineries in Russia. It plays a key role in supplying the Russian military, producing automobile gasoline, diesel fuel, fuel oil, and raw materials for petrochemicals.
description_en: Ukraine hits major Russian oil refinery in Krasnodar Krai, media, officials report. The Tuapse Oil Refinery, a Rosneft facility, is one of the 10 largest refineries in Russia. It plays a key role in supplying the Russian military, producing automobile gasoline, diesel fuel, fuel oil, and raw materials for petrochemicals.

title: With the President of Italy Sergio Mattarella, they discussed the...
title_en: With the President of Italy Sergio Mattarella, they discussed the...
title_uk: З Президентом Італії Серджіо Маттареллою вони обговорили...
description: With the President of Italy Sergio Mattarella, they discussed the security situation in Ukraine and all of our Europe, as well as in the Middle East and the Gulf region. He spoke about our agreements with the countries of the region regarding security cooperation. It is important to build a common defense system in Europe as well. Particular attention is paid to the assistance necessary for the energy sustainability of Ukraine, the unblocking of the decision on financial...
description_en: With the President of Italy Sergio Mattarella, they discussed the security situation in Ukraine and all of our Europe, as well as in the Middle East and the Gulf region. He spoke about our agreements with the countries of the region regarding security cooperation. It is important to build a common defense system in Europe as well. Particular attention is paid to the assistance necessary for the energy sustainability of Ukraine, the unblocking of the decision on financial...
description_uk: Із Президентом Італії Серджо Маттареллою обговорили безпекову ситуацію в Україні та всій нашій Європі, а також на Близькому Сході та в регіоні Затоки. Розповів про наші домовленості з країнами регіону щодо безпекової співпраці. Важливо розбудовувати спільну систему захисту і у Європі. Окрема увага – допомозі, необхідній для енергетичної стійкості України, розблокуванню рішення про фінансовий...
